caption: A man stands in front of a whiteboard, holding a small device in his right hand and a box with a screen on it in his left. He appears to be demonstrating or explaining something related to the items he is holding. The setting looks like a classroom or a presentation room, with a computer monitor visible in the foreground. After showing the box, he puts it down and continues to speak while gesturing with the small device in his hands. His body language suggests that he is engaged in explaining the features or functionality of the objects.
